channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: America’s pro-Israel lobby is facing a backlash
item.description: "America's pro-Israel lobby is under fire. With growing criticism and controversy surrounding its influence, the lobby is facing a significant backlash. Read more about the shifting landscape: https://www.economist.com/united-states/2026/03/26/americas-pro-israel-lobby-is-facing-a-backlash"
